evidence_policy: Frozen regressions are confirmed extraction-unit divergences derived from the responsible findings lane; they are not upstream CVEs or repository-defect claims without a separate upstream source audit.

regression_contract: checked C/Rust extraction-unit source hashes match this frozen manifest
symbolic witness and safe input remain attached to the finding record
existing docs/repro reproduction bundle is present and shell-syntax valid
when clang/UBSan and the target compiler are available, witness traps on C and is defined on the target while the safe control stays silent
regressions.remediation: Accumulate byte counts in an unsigned or widened type, or guard the maximum representable value before translating to wrapping target arithmetic.
regressions.upstream_status: upstream-instance source audit pending; this record must not be cited as an upstream uutils/coreutils CVE or confirmed repository defect
